This website is built with static HTML/CSS/JavaScript using the ASE (Attribute Semantic Engine) content framework. 
All content is managed through content/content.json and hydrated into the DOM via scripts/ase-bridge.js.

Repository: nikcommits/afellah-haustechnik (GitHub Pages)
Last updated: 2026-05-24
Business: Meisterbetrieb für Sanitär und Heizung in Krefeld, Deutschland
